# react-native-model-viewer-webview docs

> Public documentation site for `react-native-model-viewer-webview`, a
> WebView-backed GLB/glTF preview component for React Native and Expo.

## Start here

- [Docs home](./index.html): install, examples, use-case ideas, agent support,
  and limitations.
- [Package README](https://github.com/adityabhattad2021/react-native-model-viewer-webview#readme):
  npm package documentation in the repository.
- [AI agent usage](https://github.com/adityabhattad2021/react-native-model-viewer-webview/blob/main/docs/AGENT_USAGE.md):
  AGENTS.md, llms.txt, Claude Code, and portable Agent Skill notes.

## Key ideas

Use this package for simple single-model previews. Use Filament, React Three
Fiber Native, Three.js, or Expo GLView for native rendering, custom scenes,
shaders, physics, AR, or game-like interaction.
